section.title: InputCommons.h
section.programlisting: 1 #ifndef HDEF_INPUTCOMMONS 2 #define HDEF_INPUTCOMMONS 3 4 #include <array> 5 6 namespace Mochi::Input 7 { 8 9 enum ActionTrigger 10 { 11 Never = 0, 12 Down = 1, 13 Pressed = 2, 14 Released = 3, 15 ActionTriggerCount = 4 16 }; 17 18 enum MouseButton 19 { 20 MouseButtonInvalid = -1, 21 MouseButtonLeft = 0, 22 MouseButtonCenter = 1, 23 MouseButtonRight = 2, 24 MouseButtonSide1 = 3, 25 MouseButtonSide2 = 4, 26 MouseButtonsCount = 5 27 }; 28 29 enum MouseAxis 30 { 31 MouseAxisInvalid = -1, 32 MouseAxisX = 0, 33 MouseAxisY, 34 MouseAxisDeltaX, 35 MouseAxisDeltaY, 36 MouseAxisCount 37 }; 38 39 enum GamepadAxis 40 { 41 GAMEPAD_AXIS_INVALID = -1, 42 GAMEPAD_AXIS_LEFTX, 43 GAMEPAD_AXIS_LEFTY, 44 GAMEPAD_AXIS_RIGHTX, 45 GAMEPAD_AXIS_RIGHTY, 46 GAMEPAD_AXIS_LEFT_TRIGGER, 47 GAMEPAD_AXIS_RIGHT_TRIGGER, 48 GAMEPAD_AXIS_COUNT 49 }; 50 51 enum GamepadButton 52 { 53 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_INVALID = -1, 54 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_SOUTH, 55 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_EAST, 56 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_WEST, 57 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_NORTH, 58 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_BACK, 59 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_GUIDE, 60 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_START, 61 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_LEFT_STICK, 62 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_RIGHT_STICK, 63 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_LEFT_SHOULDER, 64 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_RIGHT_SHOULDER, 65 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_DPAD_UP, 66 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_DPAD_DOWN, 67 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_DPAD_LEFT, 68 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_DPAD_RIGHT, 69 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_MISC1, 70 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_RIGHT_PADDLE1, 71 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_LEFT_PADDLE1, 72 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_RIGHT_PADDLE2, 73 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_LEFT_PADDLE2, 74 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_TOUCHPAD, 75 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_MISC2, 76 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_MISC3, 77 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_MISC4, 78 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_MISC5, 79 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_MISC6, 80 GAMEPAD_BUTTON_COUNT 81 }; 82 83 struct GamepadData 84 { 85 std::array<float, GamepadAxis::GAMEPAD_AXIS_COUNT> AxisData; 86 std::array<bool, GamepadButton::GAMEPAD_BUTTON_COUNT> ButtonsData; 87 }; 88 } 89 90 #endif
